allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const c=fs.readFileSync\(''D:/워너넷자료/WNN_MSSQL.sql'',''utf-8''\); const c2=fs.readFileSync\(''D:/워너넷자료/WNN.sql'',''utf-8''\); console.log\(''Output: F=''+\(\(c.match\(/CREATE FUNCTION/gi\)||[]\).length\)+'' P=''+\(\(c.match\(/CREATE PROCEDURE/gi\)||[]\).length\)+'' T=''+\(\(c.match\(/CREATE TABLE/gi\)||[]\).length\)\); console.log\(''Input:  F=''+\(\(c2.match\(/CREATE FUNCTION/gi\)||[]\).length\)+'' P=''+\(\(c2.match\(/CREATE PROCEDURE/gi\)||[]\).length\)+'' T=''+\(\(c2.match\(/CREATE TABLE/gi\)||[]\).length\)\);")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\Program Files*\\Microsoft SQL Server'' -Recurse -Filter ''ssms.exe.config'' 2>$null | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_FullName; Select-String -Path $_FullName -Pattern ''DbProviderFactories'' }")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft SQL Server'' -Recurse -Filter ''ssms.exe.config'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName")
Bash(powershell -Command "Select-String -Path ''C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio 22\\Release\\Common7\\IDE\\SSMS.exe.config'' -Pattern ''DbProviderFactories''")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Content ''C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft SQL Server Management Studio 22\\Release\\Common7\\IDE\\SSMS.exe.config'' | Select-Object -Skip 2220 -First 10")

Bash(powershell -Command 'foreach \($f in @\('\\''D:\\SWPROJECT\\SWPROJECT\\uFrmHospCd.pas'\\'','\\''D:\\SWPROJECT\\SWPROJECT\\uDAO_Hosp.pas'\\'','\\''D:\\SWPROJECT\\SWPROJECT\\uDTO_Hosp.pas'\\''\)\) { $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\); if \($bytes[0] -ne 0xEF -or $bytes[1] -ne 0xBB -or $bytes[2] -ne 0xBF\) { $bom = [byte[]]@\(0xEF,0xBB,0xBF\); $newBytes = $bom + $bytes; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllBytes\($f, $newBytes\); Write-Host "$f : BOM added" } else { Write-Host "$f : already has BOM" } }')

PowerShell(python -c "import pandas as pd; xl = pd.ExcelFile\(r'D:\\2.���ʳ��ڷ�\\���ʳ�\(����\)\\���Ǳ���.xlsx'\); [print\(f'Sheet: {s}'\); print\(pd.read_excel\(xl, sheet_name=s, header=None\).head\(30\).to_string\(\)\); print\(\) for s in xl.sheet_names]" 2>&1)

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\trc_text.txt"; $content = Get-Content $tmp -Raw; ""; "=== PB_OPTION 등장 위치 \(B 제외\) ==="; [regex]::Matches\($content, "\(?i\)PB_OPTION\\b"\) | ForEach-Object { "Pos $\($_.Index\): $\($_.Value\)" }; ""; "=== INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE 발생 여부 ==="; [regex]::Matches\($content, "\(?i\)\\b\(INSERT\\s+INTO|UPDATE\\s+\\w+|DELETE\\s+FROM\)\\b"\) | ForEach-Object { "Pos $\($_.Index\): $\($_.Value\)" } | Select-Object -First 20; ""; "=== YUHYUNG 등장 ==="; [regex]::Matches\($content, "\(?i\)YUHYUNG"\) | ForEach-Object { "Pos $\($_.Index\): $\($_.Value\)" })

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\trc_text.txt"; $content = Get-Content $tmp -Raw; ""; "=== Pos 28000~30000 영역 \(LAB 환경설정 추정 구간\) ==="; $content.Substring\(28000, [Math]::Min\(2200, $content.Length - 28000\)\))
